---
title: "CU DataSoc"
---

Welcome to the Carleton University Data Science Society.

## Who are we?

We are data. Yes.

```{r}
source("images/plots/plots.R")
program_plot("2025/2026")
```

## Latest blog posts

::: {#latest-blog-posts}
:::
```{=quarto}
---
listing:
  contents: blog
  sort: "date desc"
  limit: 3
  type: grid
  excerpt-length: 20
---
```
